collection per project folder basename _derive_collection_name
ground_truth: Each workspace subfolder is indexed into its own Qdrant collection named from the folder basename via _derive_collection_name.

query_text: class OllamaDenseBackend ollama embed HTTP
ground_truth: Dense query and document embeddings use OllamaDenseBackend, which calls the Ollama HTTP embed API (ADR 0011).

hybrid_search Field default true Settings
ground_truth: HYBRID_SEARCH defaults to true in Settings, enabling dense plus sparse prefetch and RRF fusion in QdrantStorage search.
